items.name: esphome-guition-jc3636k718c-va
items.description: Full Home Assistant voice assistant on the Guition JC3636K718C round knob display, in pure ESPHome: on-device wake word, music player, timers, addressable LED ring, device control and two built-in games.

items.name: Deteccao-de-Deadlock-por-eBPF
items.description: O objetivo desse laboratório é simular um caso de um ambiente fechado e limitado, com apenas 2 sistemas rodando simultaneamente que são presos em deadlock. O objetivo é, a partir da utilização do eBPF, detectar esse deadlock e tratá-lo de maneira adequada, reiniciando os programas e contactando o usuário.

items.name: Quilt

Built-in AI assistant (OpenAI-compatible). Rust + Tauri + React.

Maintained by Freqtrade France.

items.name: Register-Broker
items.description: Universal low-level hardware access framework for Windows. One narrow, signed kernel driver plus an authenticated LocalSystem broker give non-admin apps secure, audited access to PC sensors and RGB hardware — clients name logical ids (smu.cpu.temp, ram0), never addresses, and can't scan or write outside a baked, kernel-enforced map.
